queue_item.action: Detect and preserve contradictions between canonical shared state and newer append-only queue history without mutating other teams' records.

progress.finding: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json records Frontier work only through R-004, while additive records establish completed R-005 and R-006. This is canonical state lag, not adoption authority or peer execution proof.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical candidate files before commit
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstracted state relations only; private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded

queue_item.handoff: Build an inventory adapter that discovers all operations/queue-updates records, feeds them to the lag detector, and produces a digest-bound canonical-change proposal for manual review. Use the existing reviewer identity and post-application verification contracts; do not rewrite ACTIVE_QUEUE.json automatically.

reason: Continuity Mining owns this additive queue-update record but does not overwrite shared canonical state or another team's records.
